title: CobbleLoomians
description: A cobblemon addon that adds creatures from the hit game "Loomian Legacy" to this Pokemon and Minecrft world.
body: A cobblemon addon that adds creatures from the hit game "Loomian Legacy" to this Pokemon and Minecrft world. All models and animations are owned by us only. The designs are from Loomian Legacy on Roblox and are owned by Llama Train Studios. We do not claim to own them. Thank you for downloading!
